content:
I am excited to share that I have successfully completed the 6-week Certificate Course on Data Protection and Privacy Law from Lawful Legal, under the guidance of Ms. Pakhi Garg.

Throughout the program, I explored- Data Protection Principles,Privacy Law Frameworks,Cyber Law,Compliance & Governance,Contemporary Legal Challenges in the Digital Ecosystem
This experience has broadened my legal perspective and reinforced my interest in technology law and data governance.

I extend my sincere gratitude to the mentors and the Lawful Legal team for their support and guidance.
I look forward to applying these learnings while continuing my journey of professional and academic development.
Lawful Legal 
Saumya Srivastava

comment: As privacy regulations evolve, the real challenge will be translating legal principles into operational practices—especially for consent management, vendor risks, and everyday data handling.
